recommendations.title: Body Snatchers
recommendations.overview: When Environmental Protection Agency inspector Steve Malone travels to a remote military base in order to check for toxic materials, he brings his family along for the ride. After arriving at the base, his teenage daughter Marti befriends Jean Platt,

recommendations.title: Top Gunner
recommendations.overview: Recent graduates of a secluded U.S. Air Force base must protect a gene-editing bioweapon from the Russian military—who are desperate to seize the deadly viral agent at any cost.

recommendations.title: Project: ALF
recommendations.genres: Comedy, Family, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Six years ago, the lovable intergalactic fugitive Gordon Shumway, best known as ALF, was on his way back to his new home when the Alien Task Force finally caught up with him. Now, he is being studied at a top-secret military base where he finds allie

recommendations.title: Leviathan
recommendations.overview: Underwater deep-sea miners encounter a Soviet wreck and bring back a dangerous cargo to their base on the ocean floor with horrifying results. The crew of the mining base must fight to survive against a genetic mutation that hunts them down one by on

recommendations.title: DeepStar Six
recommendations.overview: The crew of an experimental underwater nuclear base are forced to struggle for their lives when their explorations disturb a creature who threatens to destroy their base.

recommendations.title: Doctor Who: Last Christmas
recommendations.overview: The Doctor and Clara face their Last Christmas. Trapped on an Arctic base, under attack from terrifying creatures, who are you going to call? Santa Claus!

recommendations.title: Firebird
recommendations.overview: At the height of the Cold War, a troubled soldier forms a forbidden love triangle with a daring fighter pilot and his female comrade amid the dangerous surroundings of a Soviet Air Force Base.

recommendations.title: Operation Christmas Drop
recommendations.overview: While gathering evidence to support closing a tropical U.S. Air Force base, a congressional aide warms to its generous captain.

recommendations.title: Doctor Who: The Waters of Mars
recommendations.genres: Horror, Science Fiction, Drama, Mystery, Adventure, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: In a Mars base, the inhabitants are being infected by a mysterious water creature which takes over its victims. The Doctor is thrust into the middle of this catastrophe, knowing a larger one is waiting around the corner.

recommendations.title: Contamination
recommendations.overview: A former astronaut helps a government agent and a police detective track the source of mysterious alien pod spores, filled with lethal flesh-dissolving acid, to a South American coffee plantation controlled by alien pod clones.
